title: Una nueva y gloriosa nación
writer: Julián Ajuria, W.C. Clifford, Garrett Graham
actors: Francis X. Bushman, Jacqueline Logan, Guido Trento
plot: In early 1800s colonial Argentina, Belgrano leads a revolt against the oppressive Spanish authorities, and his poorly trained and badly equipped army inflicts a series of stunning defeats on the superior Spanish and loyalist force...
